---
title: C.V.
format:
  quarto-cv-pdf: default
author: Lauren E. Price, M.P.P., R.T.S.B.A.
date: last-modified
phone: +1-772-485-2635
# address: "Gallup StrengthsFinder: Input • Learner • Ideation • Strategic • Intellection"
email: Lauren.3.Price@gmail.com
fontsize: 11pt
#fontfamily: ebgaramond-maths # default font LaTeX package https://tug.org/FontCatalogue/about.html
#mainfont: Ubuntu # if you want to use a different locally installed font
github: pricele2 # github account
#twitter: twitter # twitter handle
web: linkedin.com 
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
# bibliography: 
#   peer: peer_bib.bib
#   other: other_bib.bib
validate-yaml: false
csl: apa-cv.csl

# https://github.com/orgs/quarto-dev/discussions/1182#discussioncomment-2984986 
# U+2022 	• 	Bullet 	0916
---

# Summary

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.  

# Experience 
\hrule

## **Houston Independent School District \hfill 2014 - 2025**
*Director, Finance Project Management* \hfill Jan. - Sep. 2025

- Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. 

- Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. 

- Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo.

*Senior Analyst then Deputy Director (CTM), Data Science & Analytics* \hfill Oct. 2021 - Dec. 2024

- Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. 

- Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. 

- Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo.

*Program Analyst & Grant Manager, Special Revenue* \hfill Aug. 2014 - Sep. 2021

- Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. 

- Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. 

- Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo.

## **Tennessee (2012-2014) and Colorado (2005-2011) \hfill 2005-2014**

<!-- Summer Associate for Research and Policy, *Metro Nashville Public Schools* \hfill 2014 -->

Practicum Intern for Nashville Promise Neighborhood, *Martha O'Bryan Center* \hfill 2013-2014

Graduate Research Assistant & Summer Program Evaluation Associate, *Vanderbilt University* \hfill 2012-2014

Development Director, *Boys Hope Girls Hope of Colorado* \hfill 2010-2011

Program Associate & Project Coordinator, *Community Resource Center*  \hfill 2008-2010

Project Coordinator, Feasibility Studies \& Capital Campaigns, *Robert B. Sharp Company* \hfill 2007-2008

Program Coordinator & Associate Grants Officer, *El Pomar Foundation* \hfill 2005-2007

# Leadership & Impact 
\hrule

*Lorem* 

*Ipsum* 

# Education & Credentials
\hrule

<!-- *DAMA International:* [Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP)](https://dama.org/certification/about-cdmp-certification/) \hfill In Progress -->

NCES Fellowship in Innovation Science for Education Analytics  \hfill University of Washington, 2025
<!-- https://www.amplifylearn.ai/isea/ -->

Registered Texas School Business Administrator (R.T.S.B.A.) \hfill TX Assoc. of School Business Officials, 2020

<!-- - Coursework specializations in Payroll (PAY) and Accounting & Finance (ACT) -->

Master's of Public Policy in K-12 Education Policy & Leadership \hfill Vanderbilt University, 3.92 GPA

<!-- - *Parents and Teachers in Title I Schools* [Unpublished master's thesis] -->

Bachelor of Arts, *cum laude* \hfill University of Notre Dame, 3.78 GPA

# Technical Proficiencies
\hrule
\begin{tabular}{ p{4cm}  p{1.5cm}  p{4cm}  p{1.5cm}  }
R                   & 5 of 5  & Git, GitHub & 4 of 5 \\
Excel, PowerQuery   & 5 of 5  & Stata       & 4 of 5 \\
PowerSchool SIS     & 5 of 5  & Rmd, Quarto, LaTeX  & 3 of 5 \\
SharePoint Admin    & 5 of 5  & PowerBI, Tableau & 3 of 5  \\
Qualtrics PowerUser & 4 of 5  & Python      & 2 of 5 \\
PeopleSoft, SAP ERP & 4 of 5 & SQL      & 2 of 5 \\
\end{tabular}
